name: kxco-post-quantum-webhook
description: Drop-in webhook signing + verification for Express, Fastify, Hono, Cloudflare Workers, and Vercel Functions. Hybrid HMAC-SHA-256 + ML-DSA-65 (NIST FIPS 204) signatures over the canonical kxco-post-quantum webhook envelope. Use this on the sender side to outbound-sign with a single function; use it on the receiver side as a one-line middleware that rejects unsigned, stale, or kid-mismatched deliveries.
author: KXCO by Knightsbridge <hello@kxco.ai>

scripts.test: node --test --test-reporter=spec test/builders.test.js test/client.test.js test/adapters.test.js test/fastify.test.js test/response-signing.test.js test/verified-fetch.test.js
scripts.test:cov: node --test --experimental-test-coverage test/builders.test.js test/client.test.js test/adapters.test.js test/fastify.test.js test/response-signing.test.js test/verified-fetch.test.js
scripts.lint: node -c src/index.js && node -c src/builders.js && node -c src/client.js && node -c src/response-core.js && node -c src/verified-fetch.js && node -c src/express.js && node -c src/fastify.js && node -c src/hono.js && node -c src/workers.js && node -c src/vercel.js
